title: Form Runtime Engine — Form Configuration
description: Canonical JSON Schema for form configurations accepted by the Form Runtime Engine. Matches the rules enforced by FRE_JSON_Schema_Validator. This is the contract used by the Claude Cowork connector (Phase 2+) to generate form definitions; it is also suitable for editor integrations, validation tooling, and third-party form generators. Hand-authored in Phase 1 of the Cowork connector work; a future refactor will flip FRE_JSON_Schema_Validator to consume this document directly so the schema and the enforcement logic cannot drift.

title.description: Human-readable form title. Displayed in admin listings and, optionally, above the rendered form when settings.show_title is true.

version.description: Free-form version string maintained by the form author. Not enforced by the engine. Distinct from the connector-managed connector_version the repository bumps automatically.

fields.description: Every field defined in the form. Order matters — it drives render order in the default template.

steps.description: Multi-step form definition. When present, every field should set its `step` property to one of the step keys defined here. Fields without a `step` assignment render before the first step.

fieldType.description: Supported field types. New types can be added via the `fre_field_types` filter, but connector-generated forms should stick to this list for portability.

columnWidth.description: Fractional column width for inline layouts.

oneOf.description: Shorthand: when the value and label are identical, a bare string is accepted.

field.description: Key of another field in this form whose value the rule reads.

value.description: Comparison value. Type depends on operator: scalar for equals/not_equals/contains/greater_than/less_than, array for in/not_in, absent for is_empty/is_not_empty/is_checked/is_not_checked.

conditions.description: Conditional visibility logic. The field is shown only when the rules evaluate to true under the specified logic.

logic.description: How multiple rules combine. Default is `and` (all must match).

key.description: Unique identifier within this form. Must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, underscores, or dashes. Snake_case is the project convention.

default.description: Default value. Type matches the field's value type (string for text/email/tel/etc., array for multi-select checkboxes).

description.description: Help text rendered below the field.

section.description: Key of a section-type field in this form that this field belongs to.

step.description: Key of a step in the form's top-level `steps` array that this field belongs to.

options.description: Choice list for select/radio fields, and for checkbox group fields.

inline.description: Render options inline (horizontally) instead of stacked. Applies to radio and checkbox groups.

multiple.description: Allow multiple selections. Applies to select (dropdown) and file.

max_size.description: File-field maximum size in bytes. Default 5242880 (5 MB).

content.description: HTML content for a message-type field. Sanitized via wp_kses_post at render time.

style.description: Visual treatment for a message-type field.

min.description: Minimum date for a date-type field (YYYY-MM-DD).

max.description: Maximum date for a date-type field (YYYY-MM-DD).

country_restriction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes (lowercase) to restrict Google Places autocomplete for an address-type field.

allOf.comment: Select and radio fields MUST provide an options array. Checkbox fields MAY provide options (group) or omit them (single boolean).
Message fields should carry either label or content — they exist to display information.

key.description: Unique step identifier referenced by fields via their `step` property.

title.description: Display title for the step, shown in progress indicators.

to.description: Recipient email address(es). String (comma-separated) or array. Template variables supported: {admin_email}.

reply_to.description: Reply-To header. Template variables supported: {field:<key>} to pull from a submitted field.

min_submission_time.description: Seconds a human should minimally take before submitting.

settings.description: Form-level behavior and presentation settings. Unknown properties are ignored (validator warns).

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect to after successful submission. Null/absent means no redirect.

webhook_url.description: Outbound webhook URL. Validated by FRE_Webhook_Validator (HTTPS, SSRF-protected).
